# Presentations

-   **Lecture 1: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence**

![Lecture_1-Introduction_AI](presentations/Lecture_1-Introduction_AI.pdf){width="60%" height="400"}

     

-   **Lecture 2: Digital Machines, Intelligence & Consciousness**

![Lecture_2-Digital_machines_Intelligence_Consciousness](presentations/Lecture_2-Digital_machines_Intelligence_Consciousness.pdf){width="60%" height="400"}

     

-   **Lecture 3: Machine Learning Algorithms**

::: {.callout-note appearance="default" icon="false" style="border-left: 5px solid #B7472A;"}
## <i class="bi bi-lightbulb-fill" style="color: #B7472A;"></i> Get the Presentation

You can download the complete Power Point presentation file from here:

<a href="presentations/Lecture_3-Machine_learning.pptx" class="btn btn-primary" download style="background-color: #B7472A; border: none; padding: 10px 20px; text-decoration: none; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; border-radius: 4px; color: white; font-weight: 500;"> <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-ppt-fill"></i> Download PowerPoint </a>
:::

     

-   **Lecture 4: Deep Learning**

::: {.callout-note appearance="default" icon="false" style="border-left: 5px solid #B7472A;"}
## <i class="bi bi-lightbulb-fill" style="color: #B7472A;"></i> Get the Presentation

You can download the complete Power Point presentation file from here:

<a href="presentations/Lecture_4-Deep_learning.pptx" class="btn btn-primary" download style="background-color: #B7472A; border: none; padding: 10px 20px; text-decoration: none; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; border-radius: 4px; color: white; font-weight: 500;"> <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-ppt-fill"></i> Download PowerPoint </a>
:::

     

-   **Lecture 5: Data in the age of AI**

![Lecture_5-Data](presentations/Lecture_5-Data.pdf){width="60%" height="400"}

     


-   **Lecture 6: Real-world examples and applications of AI**

![Lecture_6-AI_Applications](presentations/Lecture_6-AI_Applications.pdf){width="60%" height="400"}
